name: Mock Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Combine tofu, lemon juice, salt, honey, vanilla, and sugar in a food processor or blender.
3. Process until smooth and creamy.
4. Pour the mixture into the baked pie crust.
5. Bake for 40 minutes.
6. Cool before serving.
Per serving: 376 cal; 10g protein, 41g carbs, 21g fat (48%).
